# Yadhu Krishna S M

Also known as: yadhukrishnasm, yksm.

> Frontend engineer at Nysa Clan, and a maker. Based in Kozhikode, Kerala, India.

Yadhu Krishna S M builds web and mobile software, mostly frontend (React, React Native, Next.js, SvelteKit, Remix), and is slowly picking up Go for backend work. Currently a Software Engineer at Nysa Clan, and a distance MCA student.

## Pages

- [Home](https://yadhukrishnasm.vercel.app/): introduction, current work, projects, work history, and things still queued up to build.
- [Resume](https://yadhukrishnasm.vercel.app/resume): resume preview and PDF download.
- [Blog](https://yadhukrishnasm.vercel.app/blog): write-ups on projects and things being learned (coming soon).

## Notable projects

- Namaste Service — a system for transparent after-sales product servicing, with apps for customers, technicians, dealers, and service centers, plus a central admin panel.
- Trace Your Data (https://trace-your-data.vercel.app/) — a graph view of every connection in a frontend codebase.
- SalesGo — an admin panel and React Native app for delivery, inventory, and billing, with geofencing.
- Service Bill — a billing app built specifically for authorized service centers.
